name: Talk to Your Data
description: Context-aware reporting assistant with LLM backend. Assign a model in the Builder Panel — no scripting or linked analysis required.

title.description: Header title shown inside the widget.

showDiagnostics.description: Show binding diagnostics (recommended during setup, disable for end users).

backendUrl.description: Base URL of the backend API service (e.g. https://your-backend.com).

apiTimeoutMs.description: Request timeout in milliseconds for backend API calls.

feeds.description: Assign dimensions from the model (e.g. Region, Product, Period). Widget auto-reads filtered members.
Assign measures from the model (e.g. EBIT, Revenue). Widget auto-reads filtered values.
